title: calendella
intro: Calendella is a plant-based remedy obtained from the plant Calendula officinalis, commonly known as pot marigold, which is a daisy-like flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. Calendella has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various skin conditions such as wounds, burns, and eczema. The health benefits of calendella include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infection, as well as its potential to soothe and calm irritated skin. Calendella is typically prepared as an herbal infusion, topical cream, or ointment, which can be used to treat skin irritations, promote healing, and provide relief from pain and discomfort.
